textContent:
Hi Sinead.

First of all, I really appreciate these long messages. I've really gotten to understand what you feel and what you're going through right now. 

Not so serious things out of the way muna. About the commission group, yes it would suck that I wouldn't be able to be a part of it since I also need the money. Pero you know how things get when feelings like this are left unsettled. I don't wanna experience that anymore. Kaya I really have to (even though it's hard) be away from you guys. Just for my mental health na rin. I know u guys are gonna run this group well, I know it. 

Expounding on what I said earlier: unsettled feelings. I guess I'm doing now what I should've months ago when I first confessed my feelings to you. It was really dumb of me to reintegrate with you guys again after only a week of my confession, when I still haven't healed and still had leftover feelings for you. Those bottled up feelings only grew stronger when we were on Discord more often and I was deluded even more. It's hard not imagining a future with you when I'm kinda already living in it, and it was an unhealthy way of looking at things. 

About how you made me feel, don't worry. I don't blame you solely for that. I was the cause for all of this, and always hiding and coming back when I'm kinda okay was not the way of doing things. Although I don't appreciate you teasing me that I have a boyfriend kasi alam ko namang alam mo pa rin na may gusto ako sayo, pero inasar mo pa rin na may "jowa" ako. Those are jokes I know, pero wala lang. I just felt hurt by them. 

I do eventually have to accept na kahit na cinonsider mo tayo in the future and we seem happy in it, pero u don't wanna go down that path naman. I do hope though the lucky person with you on that path can see your brilliant mind, unserious personality, and the beautiful soul you have. 

This isn't goodbye. Whenever I do come back, I hope you won't be a stranger.

Hi Sinead.


First of all, I really appreciate these long messages. I've really gotten to understand what you feel and what you're going through right now. 


Not so serious things out of the way muna. About the commission group, yes it would suck that I wouldn't be able to be a part of it since I also need the money. Pero you know how things get when feelings like this are left unsettled. I don't wanna experience that anymore. Kaya I really have to (even though it's hard) be away from you guys. Just for my mental health na rin. I know u guys are gonna run this group well, I know it. 


Expounding on what I said earlier: unsettled feelings. I guess I'm doing now what I should've months ago when I first confessed my feelings to you. It was really dumb of me to reintegrate with you guys again after only a week of my confession, when I still haven't healed and still had leftover feelings for you. Those bottled up feelings only grew stronger when we were on Discord more often and I was deluded even more. It's hard not imagining a future with you when I'm kinda already living in it, and it was an unhealthy way of looking at things. 


About how you made me feel, don't worry. I don't blame you solely for that. I was the cause for all of this, and always hiding and coming back when I'm kinda okay was not the way of doing things. Although I don't appreciate you teasing me that I have a boyfriend kasi alam ko namang alam mo pa rin na may gusto ako sayo, pero inasar mo pa rin na may "jowa" ako. Those are jokes I know, pero wala lang. I just felt hurt by them. 


I do eventually have to accept na kahit na cinonsider mo tayo in the future and we seem happy in it, pero u don't wanna go down that path naman. I do hope though the lucky person with you on that path can see your brilliant mind, unserious personality, and the beautiful soul you have. 


This isn't goodbye. Whenever I do come back, I hope you won't be a stranger.
